title: Modern Typing, Generics, and API Evolution · Spiral Review
summary: Type-check interchangeable repositories, policies, events, and domain collections in Python 3.14. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a statically checked domain API after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use Python 3.14 annotation syntax, built-in generics, unions, aliases, and forward references consistently.
Define generic classes and functions whose type parameters express a real input-output relationship.
Reason about covariance, contravariance, invariance, mutation, and substitutability in generic APIs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""python-oop cumulative stakeholder program."""

from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any

# Add one tested, typed, inspectable program increment per activity.

stimulus.title: Oop Annotation Introspection case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Use a changed review case derived from this module: python generics typing. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

steps.title: Record what required effort
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Oop Annotation Introspection applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Inspect annotations with supported APIs while accounting for lazy evaluation, forward references, and arbitrary-code risk.
